rationale: The citing paper explicitly relies on Spiller et al. (2013) for floodlight analysis when probing interactions in its moderated models. It reports Johnson-Neyman style regions of significance and uses this procedure to interpret core hypothesis tests in multiple studies, rather than citing it only as general background. This gives the cited paper a clear functional role in the empirical analysis strategy.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the floodlight/simple-effects testing approach from Spiller et al. (2013) to probe and interpret interaction effects in its moderation analyses. The method is used to identify regions where condition effects are significant across levels of PDB.
